columns.extraction_plan: The NCT identifier is reported in Chunk 4, on page 2, in the "Patients and methods" section. Extract the value "NCT00104715" from the sentence: "The trial is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT00104715)."
The PubMed ID is not explicitly reported in the PDF.
The trial name is reported in Chunk 4, on page 1, in the title of the article. Extract "GETUG-AFU15 Trial". It is also mentioned in the abstract and body of the text.

The author list is reported in Chunk 4, on page 1, at the beginning of the article. Extract "Gwenaelle Gravis, Jean-Marie Boher, Florence Joly, Michel Soulié, Laurence Albiges, Franck Priou, Igor Latorzeff, Remy Delva, Ivan Krakowski, Brigitte Laguerre, Frédéric Rolland, Christine Théodore, Gael Deplanque, Jean-Marc Ferrero, Stéphane Culine, Loïc Mourey, Philippe Beuzeboc, Muriel Habibian, Stéphane Oudard, Karim Fizazi, on behalf of the GETUG".
The publication year is reported on page 1, in the header of the journal. Extract "2016".
This is a full publication. The document contains multiple pages of detailed methods, results, and discussion sections, which is characteristic of a full publication.
The phase is reported in Chunk 4, on page 1, in the title and abstract. Extract "Phase 3".

The study is a follow-up analysis. In Chunk 4, on page 1, the abstract states: "to update overall survival (OS) data of the GETUG-AFU15 study." Also, in Chunk 4, on page 2, under "Introduction", it mentions "updated survival analyses." Extract "Follow Up".
